subject: Docker compose setup fails on first run
description: I'm following the quickstart but docker compose up exits with 'glanceboard_db: connection refused'. Did I miss an env var? Running on Debian 12.

subject: How do I add a new HTTP monitor?
description: Loving the dashboard so far. Where do I configure a new HTTP endpoint check? I only see the ping monitors in the UI.

subject: Feature request: dark mode
description: Any chance of a dark theme? I run this on a wall display in a dim room and the white background is rough at night.

subject: False-positive alerts on slow endpoint
description: One of my services responds in ~4s under load and Glanceboard keeps flagging it down. Can I raise the timeout per monitor instead of globally?

subject: Discord notification config not firing
description: Added a Discord webhook under notifications but test alerts never arrive. The webhook works fine from curl. Where should I look?

subject: Is there a public API for monitor status?
description: I'd like to pull current status into my own status page. Is there a JSON endpoint, and does it need an API token?

subject: Container restarts and loses all monitors
description: Every time I recreate the container my monitors are gone. I think the volume isn't persisting. Which path needs to be mounted?

subject: Bug: uptime percentage shows over 100%
description: The 30-day uptime card reads 100.4% for one monitor. Looks like a rounding glitch after I changed the check interval mid-window.

subject: Email notifications via SMTP relay
description: Can I point notifications at my own Postfix relay? I tried the SMTP fields but auth keeps failing with STARTTLS.

subject: Add support for TCP port monitors
description: Would love to monitor a bare TCP port (my game server) rather than only HTTP/ping. Is that on the roadmap?

subject: Reverse proxy 502 behind Caddy
description: Running Glanceboard behind Caddy and getting intermittent 502s. Websocket upgrades for live status seem to drop. Any proxy config tips?

subject: How to back up the database?
description: Before I upgrade, what's the right way to snapshot my data? Is it just the Postgres volume or is there an export command?

subject: False down alert during DST change
description: Got a flood of down alerts at 2am on the daylight-saving switch even though everything was up. Looks like a scheduling glitch.

subject: Dark mode follow-up: respect system theme
description: Saw dark mode shipped, thank you! Could it auto-switch based on prefers-color-scheme instead of a manual toggle?

subject: API token returns 401 after rotation
description: I rotated my API token and now every request returns 401 even with the new value. Do I need to restart the container for it to take effect?

subject: Compose file references missing image tag
description: The latest docs use image tag :2.0 but the registry only has :1.9 and :latest. Pull fails. Is 2.0 published yet?

subject: Group monitors into dashboards
description: I have ~30 monitors now and the single page is crowded. Could we group them into separate dashboards or tabs by environment?

subject: Notification spam on flapping service
description: A flaky service flips up/down every few minutes and I get dozens of alerts. Is there a way to set a retry threshold before notifying?

subject: Bug: monitor history chart empty after 2.0 upgrade
description: After upgrading to 2.0 the response-time chart shows no data, though new checks are recording. Did the schema migration drop history?

subject: Webhook payload format documentation
description: Building a custom integration off the alert webhook. Is the JSON payload schema documented anywhere? Want to know the field names.

subject: Run as non-root user in container
description: Security policy here requires non-root containers. The image seems to run as root. Can I set a UID, or is there a rootless variant?

subject: Add Slack notification channel
description: Discord and email work great. Any plan to add a native Slack channel? I'd rather not chain through a webhook bridge.

subject: Setup fails: port 8080 already in use
description: First-time setup and compose won't start because 8080 is taken on my NAS. How do I change the published port safely?

subject: Intermittent false-positive on DNS monitor
description: My DNS monitor reports down for a single check roughly once a day then recovers. Upstream resolver is fine. Could be a transient timeout?
